hero_subtitle: Smart, lightweight, and pixel-perfect notes for geeks. Multilingual support and context-aware capture across the web.
feature_i18n_desc: Full localization for EN, ZH, JA, and KO. A seamless global geek experience.
feature_capture_desc: Right-click save from any selection. Minimalist pixel-art toast feedback.
feature_smart_desc: Automatically categorizes notes as Code, Link, or Text using content detection.
feature_sync_desc: Floating widget and popup stay perfectly synced. Draggable inspiration entry.
